'''''Organarms''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The space station was destroyed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with a [[Missile Boat]] during the [[Battle of Organarms]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Organarms'' first appeared in the first Missile Boat combat training mission, "Dual Warheads," of the [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire|''Defender of the Empire'']] expansion pack of the [[1994]] computer game [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
